subject_output:
```yaml
# Level: fault_lines_07_the_chasm
# Tier: 3 (Fault Lines)
# Description: A vertical descent through a fault line shaft with narrow ledges and platforms

name: "The Chasm"
region: "fault_lines"
difficulty: 3
length: "medium"
checkpoint_count: 2
ember_pickups: 4
exit_position: [100, 500]
start_position: [100, 0]

# The level is a vertical shaft with platforms arranged in a descending path
# Player starts at top of shaft and must navigate down through six platforms
# Two checkpoints along the natural descent path
# Four ember pickups to collect

platforms:
  # Initial platform at start (top)
  - type: "static"
    position: [100, 0]
    size: [200, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

  # First platform - wide but requires precise jump
  - type: "static"
    position: [80, 80]
    size: [120, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

  # Second platform - narrow ledge requiring careful movement
  - type: "static"
    position: [130, 160]
    size: [60, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

  # Third platform - diagonal alignment
  - type: "static"
    position: [60, 240]
    size: [100, 20]
    material: "fault_line"
    angle: -15

  # Fourth platform - narrow and requires precise dash
  - type: "static"
    position: [120, 320]
    size: [40, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

  # Fifth platform - wide but requires careful landing
  - type: "static"
    position: [80, 400]
    size: [120, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

  # Sixth platform - final platform before exit
  - type: "static"
    position: [100, 480]
    size: [100, 20]
    material: "fault_line"

# Checkpoints along natural descent path
checkpoints:
  - position: [100, 160]  # After second platform
    name: "Checkpoint One"
    
  - position: [100, 320]  # After fourth platform
    name: "Checkpoint Two"

# Ember pickups distributed along the path
ember_pickups:
  - position: [120, 60]
    value: 2
    
  - position: [150, 140]
    value: 2
    
  - position: [100, 300]
    value: 2
    
  - position: [90, 460]
    value: 2

# Lava region at bottom of shaft
lava_region:
  position: [0, 500]
  size: [200, 100]
  lethal: true

# Exit platform (must be reached to complete level)
exit_platform:
  type: "static"
  position: [90, 500]
  size: [20, 20]
  material: "fault_line"

# Environment settings
environment:
  ambient_light: 0.1
  ember_drain_rate: 0.01
  ember_regen_rate: 0.005
  gravity: 0.5
  jump_power: 8.0
  dash_power: 12.0
  glide_power: 3.0

# Player starting state
player:
  initial_ember: 10
  max_ember: 10
  ember_dimming_factor: 0.95
```
